_comment: Tier-2 for fourc fluid#: 4C's time-integration enums are SECTION-DEPENDENT. FLUID DYNAMIC/TIMEINTEGR has 'Af_Gen_Alpha, Np_Gen_Alpha, BDF2, One_Step_Theta, Stationary' (underscored, Af_/Np_ prefixes). SCALAR TRANSPORT DYNAMIC/TIMEINTEGR has 'Gen_Alpha, BDF2, One_Step_Theta, Stationary' (underscored, no prefix). STRUCTURAL DYNAMIC/DYNAMICTYPE has 'GenAlpha, OneStepTheta, Statics, ...' (CamelCase). THERMAL DYNAMIC/DYNAMICTYPE has 'GenAlpha, OneStepTheta, Statics, Undefined' (CamelCase). The earlier catalog used bare 'GenAlpha' / 'OneStepTheta' uniformly for fluid + scatra — wrong, fails at YAML parse with 'Could not match this input'. Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
